LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT NELIA INVIERNO AKA NELIA C. INVIERNO'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT - THE MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT INVIERNO MAKING THIS MOTION AGAIN. DEFENDANT INVIERNO HAS SHOWN THAT SHE LACKED ACTUAL NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF AMCO'S CLAIM. (SEE DECLARATION OF INVIERNO 6-9). HOWEVER, DEFENDANT INVIERNO HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENT OF CIVIL PROCEDURE CODE 473.5(B) WHICH REQUIRES THAT "THE PARTY [MS. INVIERNO] SHALL SERVE AND FILE WITH THE NOTICE A COPY OF THE ANSWER, MOTION, OR OTHER PLEADING PROPOSED TO BE FILED IN THE ACTION." MS. INVIERNO DID NOT FILE A COPY OF HER PROPOSED ANSWER, MOTION OR OTHER PLEADING ALONG WITH THIS MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WITH THE NAME AND ADDRESS OF THE PREVAILING PARTY'S COUNSEL WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE RULING AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Mtn For Order Vacating Default Judgmnt
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Continued To Sep-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT NELIA INVIERNO's Motion For Order Vacating Default Judgment is continued to September 5, 2013 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 22, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Vacating Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - NELIA C. INVIERNO, TEL. NO. (650) 271-5609, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NELIA INVIERNO AKA NELIA C. INVIERNO'S Motion For Order Vacating Default And Default Judgment - The motion for order vacating default and default judgment is denied without prejudice to Defendant Invierno making this motion again. Defendant Invierno has shown that she lacked actual notice of Plaintiff AMCO's claim. (See Declaration of Invierno 6-9). However, Defendant Invierno has failed to comply with the additional requirement of Civil Procedure Code 473.5(b) which requires that "The party [Ms. Invierno] shall serve and file with the notice a copy of the answer, motion, or other pleading proposed to be filed in the action." Ms. Invierno did not file a copy of her proposed answer, motion or other pleading along with this Motion to Vacate Default. The prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order with the name and address of the prevailing party's counsel which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the ruling and to comply
with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Vacating Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Continued To Jun-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT NELIA INVIERNO AKA NELIA C. INVIERNO's motion For Order Vacating Default is continued to June 17, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than May 17, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The Court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
